records.title: 🟦 ABOUT VANGUARD
records.description:
Founded in 2015, Vanguard Group has evolved from a family business into a multi-division company delivering procurement, supply, and project management solutions across the Middle East, Europe, Africa, and beyond.

Through its specialized divisions, Vanguard ensures flexibility, scalability, and efficiency in serving both NGOs and corporate clients.

records.title: Our Project Management & Execution Philosophy
records.description: Our objective is to provide clients with an assured experience while executing their projects. Our emphasis on clear communication and follow-through procedures ensures that clients objectives are considered our top priority during the planning and execution of all processes under market mentality.

items.title: Schedule & Resources
items.description: To create detail schedule and resources plan to meet client’s project objective

items.title: Clear Communication
items.description: To communicate clearly with all project stakeholders/Clients

items.title: Progress Tracking
items.description: To track project progress and fine-tune deviations

items.title: Quality Supervision
items.description: To closely supervise the quality of project/products from initiation till completion and receiving

items.title: On-Time Delivery
items.description: To complete and deliver the projects/products on time.

records.title: Vanguard Group Divisions
records.card1Description: Headquartered in Poland and Lebanon, Vanguard Trading is a leading commodity trading house specializing in Food and Non-Food products, exporting to over 33 countries.
records.card2Description: A new generation digital agent aiming to make a difference with performance-oriented next-gen techniques in MENA and GCC regions.
records.card3Description: Experienced in leading and managing new business projects, business development, operation managing, and ERP specialization since 2015.
records.card4Description: Leading industrial and commercial projects to professionalism with detailed planning and resource optimization.
records.card5Description: Managing terms of sale, delivery, financing, insurance, and international trade barriers for generic products.
records.card6Description: Identification of global suppliers with capacity for large volumes at competitive prices and payment assurance.

records.title: Service We Provide
records.card1Description: We help businesses define clear strategies, streamline operations, and implement growth-driven solutions that align with their long-term goals.
records.card2Description: Our experienced managers ensure projects stay on schedule, on budget, and aligned with your organization’s objectives through effective planning and execution.
records.card3Description: We analyze business processes and user needs to outline precise requirements that guide successful project outcomes and eliminate uncertainty.
records.card4Description: Through in-depth performance reviews and data analysis, we uncover inefficiencies, improve compliance, and strengthen overall business health.
records.card5Description: We create impactful marketing strategies that elevate your brand, connect with target audiences, and boost your market presence.
records.card6Description: Our digital campaigns harness SEO, social media, and analytics tools to build visibility, drive engagement, and accelerate online growth.

records.title: What Our Clients Say
records.description: Trusted by NGOs and enterprises, our clients rely on Vanguard for reliable procurement, competitive pricing, and consistent delivery across every project.

cards.comment: Vanguard managed our hotel rebranding and refurbishment across multiple Gulf properties. Their project coordination, vendor control, and timely delivery exceeded expectations.
cards.name: Hussein Salam

cards.comment: They provided turnkey contracting and engineering inputs for our commercial fit-outs in the EU. Quality workmanship and rigorous project oversight throughout the delivery.
cards.name: Tarek Sayed
